- What boundary, contract, or public surface is affected?

## Boundary Check

- [ ] No new source of truth was introduced
- [ ] No private/internal path was marketed as an official stable capability
- [ ] No new top-level output path was introduced without policy
- [ ] No new third-party GitHub Action was added without commit-SHA pinning
